mapper.select: select table_name from information_schema.tables where table_schema = (select database()) order by table_name asc
SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.`COLUMNS` WHERE TABLE_NAME = #{tableName} and table_schema = (select database())
SELECT COLUMN_NAME as name, COLUMN_TYPE as type FROM information_schema.`COLUMNS` WHERE TABLE_NAME = #{tableName} and table_schema = (select database())

select field.${colName} as colValue, config.col_title, config.col_name, config.prop_name, config.form_type,config.sort,config.data_type,config.data_config from member_extend_field field left join member_extend_field_config config on config.col_name = #{colName} where field.member_id = #{memberId} limit 1
